reason: Implement Kintsugi failure-recording protocol: add docs/kintsugi-failure-records.md, enforce CI-gated append-only failure-record requirement for governance-critical path changes, remove hardcoded 'jason' REQUIRED_APPROVER from ci_gate.py and allowlist. This PR (#68) remediates the security/governance failure introduced in PR #67 (.json misread as 'jason' approver).
